title: Iridium Netherite
description: Transforms netherite into Iridium Ore from Stardew Valley
body:
![ player character holding an Iridium pickaxe and a Galaxy Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9fe5c5e753756e45be733777716be64890f1ce01.png)

#  Iridium Netherite

this pack changes netherite related items into iridium from Stardew Valley while mantaining the vanilla aesthetic. 

_(I've decided to maintain the original trim color for netherite since it would look to close to amethyst)_

### Main changes

- Netherite Sword is based on the Galaxy Sword
- Ancient Debris are based on Mystic Stones 
- Netherite Scraps into Iridium Ore
- In general, everything is purple now

## More Texturepacks
